title: cameraria havanensis
intro: Cameraria havanensis, also known as Cuban coral tree, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Malpighiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and protecting against infections. The herbal preparations of Cameraria havanensis can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
